scripts.deploy:preview: dotenv -- sh -c 'npm run build && swa deploy ./dist --env preview --deployment-token $SWA_CLI_DEPLOYMENT_TOKEN'
scripts.deploy:production: dotenv -- sh -c 'npm run build && swa deploy ./dist --env production --deployment-token $SWA_CLI_DEPLOYMENT_TOKEN'
scripts.deploy:all: dotenv -- sh -c 'npm run build && swa deploy ./dist --env preview --deployment-token $SWA_CLI_DEPLOYMENT_TOKEN && swa deploy ./dist --env production --deployment-token $SWA_CLI_DEPLOYMENT_TOKEN'
